explanations.10: This setting allows PostgreSQL to accept connections without requiring a password, which is convenient for development but insecure for production.
explanations.15: The 'expose' keyword makes the port available to other services in the same Docker network, but not to your host machine—that's what 'ports' does.
explanations.24: This maps port 8080 on your computer to port 80 inside the pgadmin container, so you'll visit http://localhost:8080 to access pgadmin.
explanations.35: Setting 'external: false' means Docker will create this network as part of this compose file rather than expecting it to already exist.
